items.summaryShort: Presentation: Designing AI Platforms for Reliability: Tools for Certainty, Agents for Discovery. Aaron Erickson explains how NVIDIA designs and tests purpose-built AI agent hierarchies.

items.title: Venus Aerospace raises $90M Series B to build a new kind of rocket engine
items.summaryShort: Venus Aerospace raises $90M Series B to build a new kind of rocket engine. Build a new kind of rocket engine, and the world will beat a path to your door.

items.title: Blue Origin reportedly raising $10B at $130B valuation
items.summaryShort: Blue Origin reportedly raising $10B at $130B valuation. Blue Origin is raising $10 billion at a $130 billion pre-money valuation from Coatue Asset Management, Bezos himself and other big-name investors, the New York Times reported.

items.title: Venus Williams-backed WeWard can now lock your apps until you hit your steps
items.summaryShort: Venus Williams-backed WeWard can now lock your apps until you hit your steps. With funding from tennis star and angel investor Venus Williams, the French app WeWard says that it increases walking time by almost 25%.
